name: DeckView (game v0.108.0 only)
author: ernes
description: Works with Slay the Spire 2 v0.108.0 ONLY — it self-disables on any other game version. Shrinks cards in deck-like views (deck view, draw/discard/exhaust piles, card library, and deck card-select screens) so more fit on screen and the whole deck is easier to read at a glance. Hover still pops a card to full size. Choose-a-card, card-reward, unlock, shop, and card-bundle screens are left at normal size.
